summary: Comprehensive testing completed for WithLove AR Heart Visualization healthcare dashboard with ChatGPT integration. All critical features working perfectly including risk-based color system, dynamic heartbeat animation, ChatGPT integration, and complete ML prediction workflow. Successfully verified AR visualization shows correct colors (green for low risk ≤40%, red for high risk >70%), ChatGPT integration with 'Powered by GPT-4' branding, and full health form functionality with 28 parameters across Clinical and Lifestyle tabs.
passed_tests: Backend API health check - ML model loaded and functional (100% success rate)
All API endpoints working: /api/, /api/health, /api/predict, /api/chat, /api/feature-info
ChatGPT integration (/api/chat) - GPT-4o responses working with health context
Risk prediction API processing all 28 parameters correctly
Risk classification system: low (≤40%), moderate (41-70%), high (>70%) working
AR Heart Visualization with risk-based color system: GREEN heart for low risk (25% = Healthy Heart)
AR Heart Visualization: RED heart for high risk (73.01% = High Risk) with color #EF4444
AR visualization displays risk level status, probability percentage, and complete legend
Dynamic heartbeat animation with different speeds based on risk level
WithLove branding correctly implemented throughout application
ChatGPT integration shows 'Powered by GPT-4' badge in AI Assistant section
Chatbot header displays 'WithLove Assistant' and 'Powered by ChatGPT' correctly
Health form with Clinical Parameters tab (13 fields) and Lifestyle & Vitals tab (13 fields)
All 26 form input fields present and functional with proper data-testid attributes
Complete workflow: form submission → prediction → results display → AR color update
Results section shows color-coded risk display (red for high risk with proper styling)
Personalized recommendations system generating contextual advice
Risk probability display working (73.01% for high risk profile)
Health status messages appropriate for risk levels
Chat functionality with real-time AI responses and typing indicators
Navigation between sections working (Health Data, Visualization, Results, AI Assistant)
Responsive design and mobile menu functionality
All required sections present: header, hero, health input, image upload, AR visualization, prediction results, precautions, AI assistant, footer
